title: What's New on MedlinePlus
content: What's New on MedlinePlus October 16, 2024 Two New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Two new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Calprotectin Stool Test This test measures a protein, calprotectin, in your stool (poop). High levels are a sign of inflammation in your intestines that may cause severe diarrhea. Pneumococcal Disease Tests These tests check for the bacteria that cause pneumococcal disease. The tests may be done on blood, urine, sputum, or cerebrospinal fluid samples. August 30, 2024 Revised and updated MedlinePlus tutorial Evaluating Internet Health Information now available in Spanish To support Surgeon General Dr. Vivek Murthyâs priority to address health misinformation, MedlinePlus completely revised and updated its tutorial Evaluating Internet Health Information . The new Spanish translation Tutorial de evaluaciÃ³n de informaciÃ³n de salud en internet is now also available. July 16, 2024 Test Your Knowledge Quizzes Added to MedlinePlus 60 Test Your Knowledge quizzes from the A.D.A.M. Medical Encyclopedia have been added to MedlinePlus. The quizzes focus on health, wellness, disorders, and conditions, and link with relevant MedlinePlus Health Topic pages and Medical Encyclopedia articles, where more information about the topic can be found. Each quiz is comprised of multiple choice and true or false questions. Quiz pages are fully accessible. January 13, 2023 My MedlinePlus Newsletter Discontinued The My MedlinePlus newsletter was discontinued as of December 31, 2022. Find trusted, reliable health information written for consumers from the NIH News in Health newsletter and the NIH MedlinePlus Magazine . Follow MedlinePlus on Instagram , Facebook , and Twitter . Here are other ways you can learn of new content added to MedlinePlus:Â Check this What's New page MedlinePlus offers several general interest RSS feeds as well as RSS feeds for every health topic page on the site. Subscribe to any of these feeds in your favorite RSS reader. January 4, 2023 MedlinePlus and MedlinePlus En EspaÃ±ol Homepages Refreshed The MedlinePlus Â and MedlinePlus en espaÃ±ol homepages will be refreshed in early January and we encourage you to visit. Changes include: Addition of a "Welcome to MedlinePlus" feature in order to follow U.S. Health and Human Services recommendations for homepages to "clearly and prominently communicate the purpose and value of the web site on the homepage" Removal of discontinued links and outdated features Rearrangement of icons linking to content to improve navigation and reduce clutter October 26, 2022 Respiratory Syncytial Virus Infections (RSV) Information onÂ Respiratory Syncytial Virus Infections (RSV) has been updated. For the latest information, check out theÂ health topic . September 24, 2022 New Medical Test Added to MedlinePlus A new medical test is available on MedlinePlus:Â Parainfluenza Tests Parainfluenza tests diagnose four common viruses that cause respiratory illnesses, including croup and bronchitis. September 22, 2022 New Health Topic Added to MedlinePlus A new health topic was added to MedlinePlus:Â Post-COVID Conditions (Long COVID) Anyone who had COVID-19, whether is was severe or mild, can have long-lasting symptoms. Learn more about Post-COVID conditions (long COVID), including symptoms, diagnosis, treatments, and prevention. August 11, 2022 Help Me Understand Genetics Pages Available in Spanish Help Me Understand Genetics is now available in Spanish:Â CÃ³mo entender la genÃ©tica These pages are an introduction to fundamental topics related to human genetics, including illustrations and basic explanations of genetics concepts. August 4, 2022 Genetic Pages Available in Spanish Four new chapters of Help Me Understand Genetics are now available in Spanish: Genetics and Human Traits ( GenÃ©tica y rasgos humanos ): Are dimples inherited? Are moles genetic? Discover the answers to more questions about genetics and human traits. Direct-To-Consumer Genetic Testing ( Pruebas genÃ©ticas directas al consumidor ): Learn about at-home genetic testing. Topics include how to choose a test, risks and benefits, testing costs and more.Â Genomic Research ( InvestigaciÃ³n genÃ³mica ): Learn about genomic research. Topics include pharmacogenomics, gene editing, and more. Precision Medicine ( Medicina de precisiÃ³n ): Explore topics that focus on how genetics can impact healthcare. May 11, 2022 Genetic Pages Available in Spanish The Gene Therapy and Other Medical Advances chapter of Help Me Understand Genetics is now available in Spanish:Â Terapia genÃ©tica y otros avances mÃ©dicos This chapter covers topics including what is gene therapy and how it works. Also discusses the ethical issues surrounding gene therapy and available treatments. February 23, 2022 Genetic Pages Available in Spanish The Genetic Consultation and Genetic Testing chapters of Help Me Understand Genetics are now available in Spanish: Consulta genÃ©tica and Pruebas genÃ©ticas These chapters cover topics including why might someone have a genetic consultation and what happens during a genetic consultation. Also, the different types of genetic testing, and how is genetic testing done. October 20, 2021 Genetic Page Available in Spanish The Inheriting Genetic Conditions chapter of Help Me Understand Genetics is now available in Spanish: Herencia de condiciones genÃ©ticas This 10 page chapter covers topics including different types of genetic inheritance, family health history, and heritability. October 7, 2021 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Fourteen new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Antibody Serology Tests Diabetes Tests Dysphagia Tests STD Tests Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorders (FASD) Screening Estrogen Receptor, Progesterone Receptor Tests Sentinel Lymph Node Biopsy Heart Disease Risk Assessment Red Blood Cell (RBC) Count Red Blood Cell (RBC) Indices Total Protein and Albumin/Globulin (A/G) RatioÂ Myasthenia Gravis Tests Chymotrypsin in Stool Cytomegalovirus (CMV) Tests September 29, 2021 MedlinePlus is now on Instagram! Follow us at: Mplusgov Â September 21, 2021 New Genetic Pages Two new pages have been added to MedlinePlus Genetics:Â Cryopyrin-associated periodic syndromes Cryopyrin-associated periodic syndromes (CAPS) are a group of conditions that have overlapping signs and symptoms and the same genetic cause. Generally, CAPS are characterized by periodic episodes of skin rash, fever, and joint pain. Familial cold autoinflammatory syndrome type 2 Familial cold autoinflammatory syndrome type 2 is a condition that causes episodes of fever, skin rash, and joint pain. These episodes can be triggered by exposure to cold temperatures, or they may arise without warning, and they can last a few hours to several days. August 24, 2021 Genetic Page Available in Spanish A MedlinePlus Genetic page is now available in Spanish:Â How Genes Work Â (CÃ³mo funcionan los genes) Curious about genes and how they work? Learn all about genes, proteins, cell division, and more. August 12, 2021 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Chorionic Villus Sampling (CVS) Rapid Tests Sleep Study Nonstress Test PCR Tests IGF-1 (Insulin-like Growth Factor 1) Test Growth Hormone Tests Renin Test G6PD Test Lactose Tolerance Tests August 3, 2021 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Tricyclic Antidepressant (TCA) Screen Esophageal pH Test PET Scan Cold Stimulation Test At-Home Medical Tests Pulse Oximetry Glucagon Blood Test Alcohol Use Screening Tests Drug Use Screening Tests Developmental and Behavioral Screening Tests July 20, 2021 Genetic Page Available in Spanish A MedlinePlus Genetic page is now available in Spanish: Variants and Health (variantes y la salud) Curious about gene mutations and how they impact health? Learn how different mutations affect health and development. July 14, 2021 New Genetic Page A new page has been added to MedlinePlus Genetics: What are the different types of genetic tests Many types of genetic tests are available to analyze changes in genes, chromosomes, or proteins. A health care provider will consider several factors when selecting the appropriate test. May 6, 2021 Genetic Page Available in Spanish A MedlinePlus Genetic page is now available in Spanish: Cells and DNA (CÃ©lulas y ADN) Discover the basics of cells, DNA, genes, chromosomes and how they work. April 16, 2021 New Genetic Page A new page has been added to MedlinePlus Genetics:Â What are mRNA vaccines and how do they work? Scientists have developed a new type of vaccine that uses a molecule called messenger RNA (or mRNA for short) rather than part of an actual bacteria or virus. mRNA vaccines work by introducing a piece of mRNA that corresponds to a viral protein. Using this mRNA blueprint, cells produce the viral protein, which triggers an immune response. March 10, 2021 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Antibiotic Sensitivity Test Basic Metabolic Panel (BMP) Catecholamine Tests How to Cope with Medical Test Anxiety How to Prepare for a Lab Test How to Prepare Your Child for a Lab Test Measuring Blood Pressure Platelet Tests What You Need to Know About Blood Testing Xylose Testing December 10, 2020 New Genetic Page A new page has been added to MedlinePlus Genetics: Terminal osseous dysplasia Terminal osseous dysplasia is a disorder primarily involving skeletal abnormalities and certain skin changes. Explore symptoms, inheritance, genetics of this condition. November 18, 2020 MedlinePlus Social Media Toolkit MedlinePlus Social Media Toolkit is now available. Share these MedlinePlus resources on your social media or other communication channels to connect your community to high-quality, relevant health and wellness information that is trusted and easy to understand, in both English and Spanish. November 10, 2020 New Health Topics Two new topics have been added to MedlinePlus:Â COVID-19 Testing Learn about the different types of tests for COVID-19, who needs a test, and how and where you can get a test. COVID-19 Vaccines Â Currently there is no approved vaccine for COVID-19 in the United States. Learn about the vaccines that are being developed and tested, and how you can enroll in a clinical trial. October 27, 2020 New Genetic Pages Two new pages have been added to MedlinePlus Genetics: MN1 gene MN1 C-terminal truncation syndrome Learn about the signs and symptoms, causes, and inheritance of MN1 C-terminal truncation syndrome and learn how changes in the MN1 gene are related to this condition. October 22, 2020 New Health Topic A new topic has been added to MedlinePlus:Â Vaccine Safety Vaccines protect you and your family from disease. Learn about vaccine safety in the United States. It includes a thorough process of testing and evaluating vaccines before they can be approved. October 2, 2020 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Twelve new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Osmolality Tests Hysteroscopy Sputum Culture Legionella Tests Nasal Swab White Blood Count (WBC) Rash Evaluation Colposcopy Barium Swallow Myelography Fluoroscopy Bronchoscopy and Bronchoalveolar Lavage (BAL) September 24, 2020 New Health Topic A new topic has been added to MedlinePlus: Cleaning, Disinfecting, and Sanitizing To avoid becoming infected by germs from surfaces and objects, it is important to wash your hands often. Itâs also important to regularly clean and disinfect surfaces and objects. Learn the difference between cleaning, disinfecting and sanitizing. September 2, 2020 Genetics Home Reference has become part of MedlinePlus. Information from Genetics Home Reference is now available in the â Genetics â section of MedlinePlus. The Genetics Home Reference pages included in MedlinePlus cover more than 1,300 genetic conditions and 1,475 genes, all of the human chromosomes, and mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA). Also included is a richly illustrated genetics primer, Help Me Understand Genetics, which offers basic explanations of how genes work and how mutations cause disorders, as well as current information about genetic testing, gene therapy, genetics research, and precision medicine. August 13, 2020 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Complement Blood Test Amniocentesis (amniotic fluid test) Anoscopy Acetaminophen Level Salicylates Level Allergy Skin Test Gram Stain Bone Density Scan Respiratory Pathogens Panel Gamma-glutamyl Transferase (GGT) Test June 27, 2020 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Hemoglobin Electrophoresis Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD) Test MRSA Tests Prothrombin Time Test and INR (PT/INR) Synovial Fluid Analysis CCP Antibody Test Â DHEA Sulfate Test Methylmalonic Acid (MMA) Test Haptoglobin (HP) Test Therapeutic Drug Monitoring May 27, 2020 New Health Topic Added A new health topic has been added to MedlinePlus:Â Caregiver Health May 5, 2020 New Health Topics Added Two new health topics have been added to MedlinePlus:Â Older Adult Mental Health Telehealth April 16, 2020 New Health Topic A new topic has been added to MedlinePlus: How to Improve Mental Health March 20, 2020 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Nine new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Strep B Test Strep A Test Reticulocyte CountÂ Iron Tests Immunofixation (IFE) Blood Test Panic Disorder Test ElectromyographyÂ (EMG) and Nerve Conduction Studies Free Light Chains D-Dimer Test February 25, 2020 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) Screening Triiodothyronine (T3) Tests Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Test Acid-Fast Bacillus (AFB) Electrolyte Panel Mononucleosis (Mono) Tests Chicken Pox and Shingles Tests Fall Risk Assessment Prenatal Cell-Free DNA Screening Suicide Risk Screening February 20, 2020 New Coronavirus Testing Page Concerned about a coronavirus? Find out when you may need testing, what happens during a test, and what the results may mean with our new Coronavirus Testing page. January 30, 2020 Coronavirus Information Updated The health topic Coronavirus Infections has been updated and includes new CDC information about the 2019 Novel CoronavirusÂ (2019-nCoV). December 10, 2019 New Health Topic A new topic has been added to MedlinePlus: Â HIV: PrEP and PEP PrEP (pre-exposure prophylaxis) and PEP (post-exposure prophylaxis) are HIV prevention methods where medicines are prescribed before (pre) or post (after) there is exposure to HIV. Discover more about treatment as prevention. December 4, 2019 PDF Fact Sheet Added The new Learn about MedlinePlus page is now available in a printable PDF Fact Sheet . November 19, 2019 Spanish Health Topic Added The health topic,Â Hidradenitis Suppurativa , is now available in Spanish:Â Hidradenitis supurativa November 13, 2019 MedlinePlus Has Retired the How to Write Easy-to-Read Health Materials page in English and Spanish. Guides for creating health materials for a general audience are available from the National Institutes of Health, the HHS Office of Disease Prevention and Health Promotion,Â and others. We encourage you to explore these resources via the MedlinePlus topic on Health Literacy . November 8, 2019 About MedlinePlus: New and Updated Information We have expanded and updated our information about MedlinePlus ! Highlights include: New pages for Â general information about MedlinePlus , Â using MedlinePlus , and information for web developers . Â A message from NLM Director Dr. Patricia Flatley Brennan A new Â overview of MedlinePlusÂ Â (with a printable PDF version coming soon) New citation format examplesÂ Â Updated Â guidelines for selection of links for MedlinePlus Updated resources for trainers and librarians Expanded guidelines for linking to and using content from MedlinePlus More information about Â how content on MedlinePlus is reviewed and updatedÂ Â To streamline this area of MedlinePlus, we have discontinued the FAQs, awards and recognition page, milestones page, bibliography, and MedlinePlus tour. When applicable, these links have been redirected to related content on MedlinePlus. As always, we welcome your feedback. Please use the âCustomer Supportâ button at the top of any page to submit a comment or question. October 3, 2019 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Three new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus Obesity Screening Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibodies (ANCA) Test Opioid Testing September 27, 2019 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Fifteen new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH) Test Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH) Isoenzymes Test Ammonia Levels Prolactin Levels Ceruloplasmin Test Natriuretic Peptide Tests (BNP, NT-proBNP) Parathyroid Hormone (PTH) Test Lactic Acid Test 17-Hydroxyprogesterone Smooth Muscle Antibody (SMA) Test Cord Blood Testing and Banking Comprehensive Metabolic Panel (CMP) Adrenocorticotropic Hormone (ACTH) Liver Function Tests Creatinine Test September 13, 2019 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Five new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Helicobacter Pylori (H. Pylori) Tests Â C. Diff Testing Pleural Fluid Analysis Â Follicle-Stimulating Hormone (FSH) Levels Test Â Luteinizing Hormone (LH) Levels Test August 30, 2019 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Five new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus: Magnesium Blood Test Creatine Kinase Phosphate in Blood Troponin Test Ova and Parasite Tests August 28, 2019 Health Topics Name Changes The following health topics have new topic names: Drug Abuse âã Drug Use and Addiction Alcoholism and Alcohol Abuse âã Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD) Pregnancy and Substance Abuse âã Pregnancy and Drug Use Prescription Drug Abuseâã Prescription Drug Misuse Opioid Abuse and Addiction âã Opioid Misuse and Addiction Opioid Abuse and Addiction Treatmentâã Opioid Misuse and Addiction Treatmentã August 22, 2019 New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus Ten new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus Aldosterone test Hearing Tests for Adults Hearing Tests for Children Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) Test Balance Tests Videoonystagmography (VNG) Burn Evaluation Malaria Tests Neurological Exam Trichomoniasis Test August 15, 2019 New Page on MedlinePlus for All of Us Research Program Participants Current and future participants of the NIH All of Us Research Program can now access trusted, understandable health information from MedlinePlus all in one place . August 14, 2019 Welcome to the What's New page This page will provide regular information about news, changes, and updates to MedlinePlus.
